Pruned 761 lines of dead orchestration layer + dead endpoints + legacy constants. Shipped on dev in 2452130.

Apr 2026 audit complete. Findings: ~700 line dead orchestration layer, dead routes (5), dead frontend exports (4), dead constants (2). All shipped in 2452130. Layer separation extracts (2 violations) deferred to next cycle.
v73 migration deletes orphan MiLB league rows (a, aa, aaa, higha) and remaps user-data references to new codes; tests added; verified on copy of prod DB

Shipped on dev: Jellyfin integration parallel to Emby. Refactored EmbyClient with PATH_PREFIX (Emby keeps /emby/, Jellyfin uses server root). Added schema columns, settings dataclass, read/update helpers, Pydantic models, /settings/jellyfin + /jellyfin/test routes, refresh hook in generation.py. Frontend: combined Emby and Jellyfin into a single 'Media Servers' tab. Visual verification via Playwright. 4 jellyfin client tests added (518 total pass).

Root cause: stale stream_match_cache rows had cached_event_data with home_team.name set but home_team.short_name=''. Diagnosed from user @millercentral's EPG XML (#201): {away_team_short} at {home_team_short} → '<display-name>at</display-name>', and {broadcast_feed_team} fell back to full team name on home feed ('Philadelphia Phillies Feed') because feed_team.short_name was empty. Fix: TeamMatcher._reconstruct_event now treats a row with name set but short_name empty as stale, returns None, deletes the cache row, and re-fetches via service.get_events on next match pass. Self-healing — no user action required. 4 tests added (522 total pass).

Real fix on dev (3 layers): (1) refresh_event_status is now additive — overlays only mutable fields (status, scores, broadcasts, odds, fight_result_*) onto the original event. Teams and other static fields are preserved verbatim. ESPN's summary endpoint omits shortDisplayName, so the old code was wiping team.short_name=None over the populated scoreboard data on every refresh. (2) Service-layer backfill from team_cache: get_event/get_events/get_team_schedule walk teams and patch short_name/abbreviation/name from team_cache when missing. team_cache (refreshed on startup from /teams endpoints) is now the canonical identity source, decoupled from per-event endpoint shape. (3) ESPN _parse_team falls back to team.name (the short form, always populated) when shortDisplayName is missing — defense in depth for new endpoints. 17 new tests, 548 total pass.

Done: EventMatcherModal extracted as shared component, now imported in both EPG.tsx and Dashboard.tsx.
May audit cycle complete: Phases 1-3 shipped on dev (500 tests pass). Phase 4-5 deferred by calendar trigger; remaining items declined/risky. Next cycle tracked separately.
Won't do: blocked since Jan 2026 on #84 ESPN-gap clarification that never arrived. ESPN already covers most NCAA. Reopen if concrete demand returns.
Won't do: depends on 5m5 (NCAA Provider) which is closed won't-do. Reopen alongside 5m5 if NCAA scraper work is revived.

Fixed on dev 3050ac7: removed dead eventsround.php, repointed sparse-league fallback to eventsseason.php (gated to SEASON_FALLBACK_LEAGUES), fail-fast on 404s. 607 tests pass (+3 regression). Unrivaled preserved. GH #217 commented; close issue at v2.5.7 release.
GO. Endpoint live-validated; data-shape doc + go/no-go delivered. Unblocks 183.2.

Added EPGManager.search_programs() + supports_program_search() feature-detection + DispatcharrProgram dataclass. Live-verified on Dispatcharr 0.24.0. 11 unit tests, full suite green (618), ruff clean. Architecture docs + version dependency documented.

Added EPGProgramIndex (consumers/matching/epg_index.py): scoped per-run fetch (one call per distinct event-group tvg_id, NOT whole instance), _Teamarr exclusion, tvg_id index + half-open overlap lookup. Added categories to DispatcharrProgram (custom_properties.categories). 10 index tests + dataclass test; full suite 628 green; ruff clean. Architecture docs updated.

EPG-title matching capability complete. StreamMatcher consumes injected EPGProgramIndex: title+sub_title through shared classify_stream->TeamMatcher (extracted _route_to_outcomes, reused by name+EPG paths), category gating (classic>non-event>event precedence, absent=attempt+fallback), one-stream-many-events fan-out, MatchMethod.EPG + program windows threaded through MatchOutcome/MatchedStreamResult, _reconcile_epg (linear=EPG wins, dedicated=name wins). Reuses TeamMatcher cache (free per-program memoization) — dropped redundant compute_program_fingerprint. 25 EPG tests, full suite 653 green, ruff clean, docs updated. Live wiring (build+inject index for opted-in groups) is 183.6.

Time-windowed stream membership complete. Window columns + gate model (user-confirmed): attach_at/detach_at on managed_channel_streams (NULL=full-life). compute_stream_window() = EPG program slot +/- global buffer, CLIPPED to neighbour programs (back-to-back wrong-game avoidance). get_ordered_stream_ids() window-aware (active=removed_at NULL AND (attach_at NULL OR attach_at<=now<detach_at)); reconciliation drift uses window-gated 'expected'. epg_program_start/end + clip bounds threaded match->lifecycle. epg_stream_pre/post_buffer settings. removed_at stays terminal. 20 windowing/clip tests, full suite 669 green, docs updated. Default-off until 183.6 wires EPG matching. Ordering predicate split to 183.8.

Fixed in EPG matching overhaul: cascade resolver (tvg_id namespace bridge, no channel requirement), naive-datetime fix, pipe-join build_match_input, preview tvg_id. Verified live (19 matches). 685 tests pass.
